title: Add proposal workspace quality summary
summary: Extend the native proposal workspace with a more truthful summary of source evidence health, scope confidence distribution, and inference quality so proposal triage does not stop at readiness and raw validation counts.
acceptance_criteria: Proposal workspace exposes a clear native summary for source evidence health, scope confidence, and inference quality.
The new summary reuses shared proposal truth helpers instead of duplicating parallel scoring logic only inside the workspace page.
The summary stays read-only and explains proposal quality without implying write-back safety that the app cannot prove.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, repo contract validation, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: Proposal workspace now exposes a dedicated quality summary for source evidence health, scope confidence distribution, and inference quality instead of stopping at readiness and validation counts.
The new summary reuses shared proposal truth helpers for source audit and derived inference quality, so proposal quality scoring does not live only inside the workspace page.
Confirmed patch hygiene and whitespace correctness.
Repo contract still passes after adding the proposal workspace quality summary.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
evidence.note: Targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build succeeded after wiring the new quality summary.

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 item 1 after HS-0035: add proposal workspace summary for source evidence health, scope confidence, and inference quality breakdown.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: Prefer shared quality helpers over per-page ad hoc scoring.
Keep inference wording truthful and explicitly bounded to read-only proposal quality.
